description_long: This is a modern, geometric cabinet or shelf unit with a striking two-tone color scheme of muted blue and deep charcoal. The structure features a rectangular body elevated on angled, black metal legs, giving it a contemporary, airy appearance. The front face includes two large sliding doors on the left, concealing storage space, and two open shelves on the right for easy access to items. The back of the unit rises into two asymmetrical panels, adding visual interest and possibly serving as a partial divider or backstop. The surfaces appear smooth and hard, likely constructed from painted or laminated wood with metal supports. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or modern public spaces, offering both concealed and open storage.
description: A modern, two-tone cabinet with sliding doors, open shelves, and angled metal legs, featuring asymmetrical back panels for a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid, flat side panel and the angled metal legs beneath the cabinet.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two sliding doors on the left, two open shelves on the right, and the asymmetrical back panels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same solid side panel and visible leg structure.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the two asymmetrical back panels and the full width of the cabinet body.
